title: Exploded Schematic
description: Une illustration vectorielle nette imitant un manuel d'instructions ou un diagramme technique. Caractérisée par des contours noirs uniformes, des lignes de processus pointillées, une perspective isométrique et des aplats de couleurs unies sans ombres.
description_en: A crisp, flat vector illustration mimicking an instructional manual or technical diagram. Features uniform black outlines, dashed process lines, isometric perspective, and unshaded solid color fills.
description_fr: Une illustration vectorielle nette imitant un manuel d'instructions ou un diagramme technique. Caractérisée par des contours noirs uniformes, des lignes de processus pointillées, une perspective isométrique et des aplats de couleurs unies sans ombres.
prompt: Clean, crisp vector technical illustration and exploded view diagram style. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. Execute with uniform, stark black line weight and precise geometric contours. Implement pure flat color fills with zero gradients, zero shading, and no directional lighting; the lighting anatomy is entirely flat and shadowless. Utilize {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}} as solid, highly saturated blocks against stark contrasting areas. Incorporate instructional graphic elements like dashed process lines, directional arrows, and sequential vertical or horizontal stacking to denote mechanical flow, assembly, or structural breakdown. Maintain a strict isometric or pseudo-isometric perspective to enhance the architectural, clinical, and informative atmosphere. The texture is perfectly smooth digital materiality, completely devoid of noise, grain, halftone dots, or brushstrokes. Edge treatment relies on hard, clean vector-cut silhouettes. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners.
prompt_removebg: Clean, crisp vector technical illustration and exploded view diagram style. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. Execute with uniform, stark black line weight and precise geometric contours. Implement pure flat color fills with zero gradients, zero shading, and no directional lighting; the lighting anatomy is entirely flat and shadowless. Utilize {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}} as solid, highly saturated blocks. Incorporate instructional graphic elements like dashed process lines, directional arrows, and sequential vertical or horizontal stacking to denote mechanical flow, assembly, or structural breakdown. Maintain a strict isometric or pseudo-isometric perspective to enhance the architectural, clinical, and informative atmosphere. The texture is perfectly smooth digital materiality, completely devoid of noise, grain, halftone dots, or brushstrokes. Edge treatment relies on hard, clean vector-cut silhouettes, composited on a clean {{background_color}} surface. The {{subject}}'s edges interact directly with the {{background_color}}, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame and be smoothly cropped by the image boundaries.
background_prompt: A sterile, clinical technical environment rendered in flat vector line art. Uniform black outlines define a grid-like, architectural space devoid of subjects. Isometric perspective with intersecting dashed lines, measurement nodes, and structural wireframes. Pure flat fills of {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}} highlight geometric planes and spatial depth without any shading or gradients, maintaining a perfectly smooth digital texture.
background_prompt_removebg: A sterile, clinical technical environment rendered in flat vector line art. Uniform black outlines define a grid-like, architectural space devoid of subjects. Isometric perspective with intersecting dashed lines, measurement nodes, and structural wireframes. Pure flat fills of {{primary_color}}, {{accent_color}}, and {{secondary_color}} highlight geometric planes and spatial depth without any shading or gradients, maintaining a perfectly smooth digital texture. A decorative foreground frame consisting of technical framing brackets, dashed borders, and schematic registration marks is placed in front of the invisible subject to create depth. The architectural scene and schematic frame transition seamlessly into a flat {{background_color}} surface, with geometric elements cleanly terminating against the solid backdrop.
